## Last-checked: 2026-06-11

# ellmos-filecommander-mcp - MCP Server for Filesystem and Process Access

> FileCommander is a comprehensive MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that gives AI assistants full filesystem access, process management, interactive shell sessions, and async file search capabilities. 44 tools in a single server -- everything an AI agent needs to interact with the local system. Part of the ellmos MCP family alongside codecommander and clatcher.

Why it exists: most filesystem MCP servers only cover basic read/write. FileCommander goes further with Safe Delete (Recycle Bin on Windows, Trash on macOS/Linux instead of permanent deletion), interactive REPL sessions (Python, Node.js, shells) accessible through the MCP protocol, async search of large directory trees running in the background while the AI continues other work, process management (list, start, terminate), string-replace editing with context validation, format conversion across JSON / CSV / INI / YAML / TOML / XML / TOON, ZIP archive create/extract/list, SHA-256 / MD5 / SHA-1 / SHA-512 checksums with compare, optional tesseract.js OCR for image text extraction, global safety mode to route all deletes through Recycle Bin / Trash, and Markdown-to-HTML/PDF export. Cross-platform with platform-specific optimizations.

Node.js >= 18, MIT. Published as `ellmos-filecommander-mcp` on npm. Listed on Glama at https://glama.ai/mcp/servers/eyurifgg4t, currently with repository metadata indexed and tool discovery pending (`tools: []`). Official MCP Registry name: `io.github.ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp`. Discovery files: `server.json` for the MCP Registry, `glama.json` for Glama-compatible MCP directories, and this `llms.txt` for LLM/documentation crawlers.

## Docs

- [README (English)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp/blob/main/README.md): Tools, installation, configuration for Claude Desktop / Claude Code
- [README (Deutsch)](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp/blob/main/README_de.md): German version
- [LICENSE](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT license text
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ellmos-filecommander-mcp): Published artifact
- [server.json](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp/blob/main/server.json): Official MCP Registry metadata
- [glama.json](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp/blob/main/glama.json): Glama-compatible MCP directory metadata

## Audience

- **AI engineers** integrating local filesystem tools into Claude Desktop, Claude Code, or custom MCP clients
- **Developers** who want safe-delete, OCR, ZIP, session management, or cloud-lock-safe file ops in their AI workflows
- **Power users** running Claude Code or similar agents and wanting full OS-level file access via MCP
- **Teams** deploying AI assistants on Windows/macOS/Linux that need cross-platform filesystem control
- **Security-conscious users** who want Recycle Bin / Trash semantics and a global safety mode before any deletion

## Search Phrases

```
MCP filesystem server
safe delete MCP server
Recycle Bin MCP
async file search MCP
process management MCP
interactive shell MCP
OCR MCP server
cloud lock safe file operations
Markdown to PDF MCP
ellmos filecommander
ellmos-filecommander-mcp
FileCommander MCP
```

## ellmos MCP family (sibling servers)

- [ellmos-codecommander-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-codecommander-mcp): Code analysis, AST parsing, import management (17 tools)
- [ellmos-clatcher-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-clatcher-mcp): Utility tools -- repair, convert, detect, batch ops (12 tools)
- [n8n-manager-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/n8n-manager-mcp): n8n workflow management via MCP (18 tools)
- [ellmos-controlcenter-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-controlcenter-mcp): MCP stack discovery, profile management, and control plane (10 tools)
- [ellmos-homebase-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-homebase-mcp): LLM memory, knowledge, state, routing, and orchestration (44 tools)
- [ellmos-servercommander-mcp](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-servercommander-mcp): Server deployment, health checks, and mail access tools (8 tools)

## Broader ellmos ecosystem

- [BACH](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/bach): Full text-based OS for LLMs -- primary consumer of the MCP servers
- [Rinnsal](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/rinnsal): Lightweight LLM agent infrastructure
- [USMC](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/usmc): Shared memory primitive

## Optional

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ellmos-ai/ellmos-filecommander-mcp/issues): Bug reports and feature requests
